meta.title: Furkan Tunalı CV
meta.description: Experienced software engineer architecting scalable, innovative solutions for multi-cloud environments, optimizing developer experience across web development, full-stack. Currently working with AI to reimagine software functionality and create intelligent solutions.

summary: Experienced software engineer architecting scalable solutions for multi-cloud environments, optimizing developer experience across full-stack web development. Currently building GenAI-powered systems and intelligent automation.

skills.items: LangGraph, LangChain, LangSmith, Ollama, MCP, PydanticAI, AutoGen, Claude API, OpenAI, Gemini and Tavily APIs
Kubernetes, AWS, GCP, Azure, Firebase, Vercel, Docker, Terraform, Nginx, Cloudflare, ZeroTier, Grafana, Loki, Tempo, Prometheus, GitHub Actions, CircleCI, Travis, Jenkins, TeamCity
Node.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Ruby, PHP, NestJS, Express
React, NextJS, Vue.js, Nuxt, HTML, CSS, PostCSS, SCSS, Wireframing

projects.name: Newsify Today
projects.subtitle: AI news platform & ChatGPT App (MCP UI App)
projects.intro: Built and operate Newsify Today — an AI news platform and early ChatGPT App tracking web search trends across 16 regions and 12 languages, running an agentic AI pipeline to curate, score, and summarize news in real time.
bullets: Built a LangGraph-based agent with 9 tools (scrape, summarize, validate, score, deduplicate) processing trends end‑to‑end with deterministic tool routing and explicit step contracts.
Self-hosted Ollama (Qwen) across 3 nodes with health-aware routing, tier-based fallback to Google Gemini, and in-flight slot tracking — keeping inference cost near zero.
Implemented a Model Context Protocol server with trend-news tool, embedded React widget (OpenAI Apps SDK), and streamable HTTP transport — launched as an early ChatGPT App.
Run full stack on a 3-node Kubernetes on-premises cluster — API, web, scraper, database, Redis queues, Cloudflare Tunnel ingress — with CI/CD via GitHub Actions and rolling deploys.
Server-Sent Events pipeline streams AI-generated articles to Next.js frontend in real time, with bridge-seeded first paint and fingerprint-based cache invalidation.
Full observability with LangSmith, Grafana, Loki — logs, traces, and metrics from server and browser, with tracing for every AI agent run.
projects.stack: TypeScript, Python, NestJS, Next.js, React, LangGraph, LangChain, Ollama, Gemini API, PostgreSQL, Redis, BullMQ, MicroK8s, Docker, Cloudflare Tunnels, Grafana/Loki/Tempo, MCP SDK, Vite, Turborepo

subroles.title: Senior AI Solutions Engineer
bullets: Integrated OpenAI and Tavily APIs to build an AI system that analyzed customer input to identify GDPR-relevant vendors, automatically retrieving hosting locations, DPO emails, and privacy policy links.
Researched AI Agent frameworks (PydanticAI, AutoGen) for solving domain-specific challenges.

subroles.title: Senior Infrastructure Engineer
bullets: Created Kubernetes and Terraform setups from scratch for scalable infrastructure and reliable deployments.
Led migration from ECS to Kubernetes (EKS) with zero downtime.
Worked with AWS suite (Fargate, ECS, CloudFormation, ECR, RDS, Cloud Map, EC2, Route53, Lambda) for service deployment.
Drafted technical implementation details to guide project development and ensure consistent coding standards.
Managed Route53 configuration, domain management, DMARC reporting, and critical incident resolution.

subroles.title: Senior Developer Experience Engineer
bullets: Built with JavaScript, TypeScript, NestJS, NextJS, Rails, and Vue.
Migrated infrastructure from Heroku to AWS ECS.
Restructured legacy Rails systems into a monorepo, Dockerized applications, and established local development environments for efficient onboarding.
Built CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions, integrated AWS ECR, and introduced Terraform for environment provisioning.
Implemented event-driven scheduling via AWS EventBridge for automated client reminders.
Developed DevOps and DX tooling (Makefile, Bash) to automate routine tasks.
Maintained Docker Compose setups for service orchestration.
Mentored team members and contributed to technical hiring.
Established technical vision and architectural standards aligned with enterprise requirements
Implemented cloud infrastructure and CI/CD pipelines for secure product delivery
Optimized containerization for AI/ML workloads, deployed models to Azure CUDA
Integrated AI systems via Jupyter Notebooks, ensuring compatibility with parent company services
Managed monorepo, automated semantic versioning, and testing strategies
Designed full-stack boilerplates for MVPs and facilitated data migrations
Led technical hiring, mentoring, and code quality standards
